description: Fixed `aspire add` and `aspire integration list`/`search` returning zero results when using dogfood or locally-built CLI builds. The root cause was that `dotnet package search` does not support local folder sources; internal framework packages (AppHost, Sdk, Orchestration, Testing) and deprecated packages no longer leak into the integration picker either.
name: Fix aspire add integration search on dogfood and local-hive CLIs
